mnemonics: INTRO to CNN: I'm a Notorious Underwater Explorer
ConvNet Evolution: Convolutional Neuron Networks Always Evolve
keyPoints: Introduction to CNNs: Images are represented as 1D vectors and convolutions help reduce dimensionality
Convolutional Neural Network (CNN): Architecture designed for image classification tasks
Architecture of CNN: Convolutional, Activation, Pooling, and Flattening layers
Convolution Operation: Local receptive field slides across the input data, weighted sum computed
Multi-scale Feature Extraction: Convolutional layers with increasing receptive fields
